46.reason: [Height is updated during traversal, but this leads to incorrect heights because the same node may be visited multiple times in recursive calls and its height may be overwritten incorrectly. Also, height should be set during insertion, not traversal.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Height is updated during traversal, but this leads to incorrect heights because the same node may be visited multiple times in recursive calls and its height may be overwritten incorrectly. Also, height should be set during insertion, not traversal.]

49.reason: [Same issue as above: modifying height during traversal causes incorrect height values, especially since traversal is not guaranteed to visit parent before children in a way that correctly propagates height.]
